summary: Completed testing of Iteration 10 features: Admin User Management, unique email enforcement, and DOB/Gender/Sum Insured columns in My Endorsements. Fixed critical bug in /api/users/create endpoint (bcrypt import missing). All 11 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/users/create - Admin can create HR user
Backend: POST /api/users/create - Admin can create Admin user
Backend: GET /api/users - Admin can list all users
Backend: DELETE /api/users/{id} - Admin can delete user
Backend: Admin-created user can login successfully
Backend: Endorsement response includes DOB, Gender, Sum Insured fields
Frontend: Admin dashboard has 'Users' tab in navigation
Frontend: User Management page shows stats cards (Total: 20, Admins: 2, HR: 18)
Frontend: User Management shows user table with Username, Full Name, Email, Phone, Role, Actions columns
Frontend: Create User dialog has role dropdown with HR User and Admin User options
Frontend: HR My Endorsements table has DOB, Gender, Sum Insured columns
Frontend: HR My Endorsements View dialog shows DOB, Age, Gender, Sum Insured fields

bug_fixed.issue: POST /api/users/create endpoint used bcrypt.hashpw() directly but bcrypt was not imported. Also password_hash was not being saved to database.
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to use get_password_hash() helper function (which uses pwd_context) and added password_hash to user_dict before database insert.

updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed bcrypt import issue in admin_create_user endpoint
/app/backend/tests/test_iteration10_features.py - Created test suite for Iteration 10 features
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Test users created with TEST_ prefix for cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 features fully tested and working. 1) Admin User Management page accessible via 'Users' tab in admin nav. Shows stats cards (Total Users, Admins, HR Users) and user table. Create User dialog has role dropdown with HR User and Admin User options. 2) Unique email enforcement works on both /api/users/create and /api/auth/register - returns 400 with 'Email already registered' message. 3) HR My Endorsements table now shows DOB, Gender, Sum Insured columns. View dialog shows all fields including DOB, Age, Gender, Sum Insured. 4) Fixed critical bug: bcrypt import was missing in admin_create_user endpoint - now uses get_password_hash() helper.

admin_user_management.details: Users tab in admin nav, stats cards, user table with all columns, Create User dialog with role dropdown (HR/Admin options)

unique_email_enforcement.details: Both /api/users/create and /api/auth/register reject duplicate emails with 400 status

my_endorsements_dob_gender_si.details: Table has DOB, Gender, Sum Insured columns. View dialog shows all fields including DOB, Age, Gender, Sum Insured
